name: /pr-corpus-update --budget-override rejects non-integer values per the L-7 operator override input contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --budget-override abc 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'invalid_budget_override' err.txt && echo rejected 1>&2
